audit_scope: TKT-0381 through TKT-0388 (8 CREST v1.2 sub-tickets, parent CHG-0482)
method: Read PG state_tickets.status for each ticket; cross-check evidence in scripts/, state/, docs/, and journal-2026-06-10/11; produce per-ticket verdict. NO status changes made — audit only.

root_cause: CREST VALIDATE phase was skipped/not enforced on the original delivery — work was committed and deployed (CHG-0482 'CREST v1.2 locked') but PG state_tickets.status was not moved to 'closed' for 7 of the 8 sub-tickets. TKT-0409 was raised to formally audit the gap and add structural enforcement so it cannot recur.
